title: To Perenna, A Mistress.
content:
Dear Perenna, prithee come
    And with smallage dress my tomb:
    Add a cypress sprig thereto,
    With a tear, and so Adieu.
meaning:
"To Perenna, A Mistress." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
